_note: Current operational context / open items captured from Kendall's texts, calls, and email that aren't movements (events.json) or invoices. The audit surfaces these so decisions made off-spine don't fall through the cracks. Update as items resolve; remove when closed.

items.title: MISSED pickup: the 6/15-17 run is stuck at Pueblo — needs a MONDAY (6/22) pickup
items.detail: The run produced 6/15-17 was NOT collected on its 6/19 ship date (the miss that started all this). Jeremy at Liberty Multimodal is working on a Monday 6/22 pickup but it is still up in the air. This is the relief valve for the critically-low inventory (BUF/FO/GR < 1 wk). This is SEPARATE from the new run's Friday pickup below.

items.title: New run (produced this week, started 6/22) ships Friday 6/26 — needs its own pickup
items.detail: Heather at DTS has a final quote ready and is waiting on Kendall's approval to schedule the 6/26 pickup. Book this week. Distinct from the stuck 6/15-17 run above.

items.title: Neighborly mislabel — Evan will relabel on their own (they have a label maker); NOT a red flag from Neighborly's side anymore
items.detail: Evan at Neighborly confirmed (via TEXT) they are fine to relabel the wrong-best-by units themselves. So Neighborly is no longer at risk and this is NOT a red flag from their side. STILL OPEN: Nathan (FK) must respond with the 5/25-27 lot codes (wrong vs correct dates, across NYC/NJ/LA accounts) AND the written process change before the 6/22 run. The FK accountability/process item is unacceptable and not yet resolved.
items.owner: Nathan (FK) — lot codes + written process change still owed

items.title: Carriacou (Brooklyn) warehouse — NEW storage option; Mendez holding space, needs date/time/# pallets (BLOCKED on securing a truck)
items.detail: Kendall reached out to Carriacou (Brooklyn; contact Mendez) about storing product there — NOT previously used. Rationale: (1) unsure Localee's hub can receive from a Sprinter van; (2) wants inventory accessible for trade shows. Mendez (6/19) confirmed space IS available and needs the final date, time, and # of pallets; Kendall is sending a PO. Can't give those details yet because there is no truck/freight booked. NEXT: once a truck is secured (see the freight items above), send Mendez the date/time/pallets to lock the Brooklyn receiving. Jake also coordinated with Mendez.
items.owner: Kendall (give Mendez details once a truck is booked); Mendez/Carriacou holding the space
